name: Proving Silicosis from Construction Silica Dust in Boise

mainEntity.name: How to prove silica dust exposure caused my silicosis in a Boise construction job?
mainEntity.text: How to prove silica dust exposure caused my silicosis in a Boise construction job?

acceptedAnswer.text: Prove silicosis causation with pulmonary function tests, chest X-rays (ILO classification), industrial hygiene reports showing silica levels above OSHA PEL (0.05 mg/m³), and specialist opinion linking to job duties.

suggestedAnswer.text: In Boise, Idaho workers' comp requires medical evidence like B-reads confirming silicosis plus exposure history from MSDS sheets, job site logs, or union records. Idaho Code §72-1001 covers occupational diseases. Challenge employer defenses like PPE provision. Claims yield medical care, temporary disability (68% wages), and PPI ratings for permanent lung impairment.
